en: Bar on upper traps, feet shoulder-width.
Brace core, sit hips back and down.
Descend until thighs parallel to floor.
zh-Hans: 杠铃放上斜方肌, 双脚与肩同宽.
核心收紧, 髋部后坐下蹲.
下降至大腿与地面平行.

en: Keep knees tracking over toes — don't collapse inward.
Don't round lower back at bottom.
Use safety bars in rack for heavy sets.
zh-Hans: 膝盖跟脚尖方向一致, 不要内扣.

en: Bar across front delts, elbows high.
Sit straight down — knees travel forward.
zh-Hans: 杠铃架在前三角肌, 肘部抬高.
下蹲过程保持躯干直立.
垂直下坐 — 膝盖向前推.

en: Wrist mobility needed — use straps if rack position hurts.
Don't let elbows drop or bar will roll forward.
zh-Hans: 需要手腕灵活性 — 不舒服用握带辅助.
肘部不要下沉, 否则杠铃前滚.

en: Bar across rear delts, below traps.
Lean torso forward more than high-bar.
Sit hips back, hinge at hips.
zh-Hans: 杠铃放后三角肌, 斜方肌下方.
比高杠位躯干前倾更多.
髋部后坐, 髋关节铰链.

en: Shoulder mobility required — uncomfortable for some.
Don't let the bar slide down your back.
zh-Hans: 需要肩部灵活性 — 部分人不适应.
不要让杠铃顺着背滑落.

en: Bar on upper traps, torso more upright.
Squat straight down, knees track forward.
Hit full depth — hips below knees.
zh-Hans: 杠铃放上斜方肌, 躯干更直立.
垂直下蹲, 膝盖向前.
蹲到底部 — 髋低于膝.

en: Ankle mobility limits depth — work on it.
zh-Hans: 脚踝灵活性影响深度 — 注意训练.

en: Bar on back, descend to parallel.
Pause 2-3 seconds at bottom — stay tight.
No bouncing out of the hole.
zh-Hans: 杠铃放背上, 下蹲至平行.
底部暂停 2-3 秒 — 保持收紧.

en: Use lighter weight than standard squat.
Box behind you at parallel height.
Sit back onto box, stay tight.
zh-Hans: 箱子在身后, 高度齐大腿.
向后坐到箱上, 保持紧绷.
短暂停顿 — 不要放松.

en: Don't crash onto box — control the descent.
Don't rock back or use momentum off box.
zh-Hans: 不要砸到箱子上 — 控制下放.
不要后倒或借惯性起身.

en: Squat between heels — elbows inside knees.
zh-Hans: 双脚与肩同宽, 脚尖微外展.
下蹲 — 肘部在膝内侧.

en: Hold kettlebell by horns at chest.
Squat down, elbows track inside knees.
zh-Hans: 下蹲 — 肘部在膝内侧.

en: Bar on upper traps, feet slightly forward.
Unrack with a twist of the bar.
zh-Hans: 杠铃放上斜方肌, 双脚略前置.

en: Don't forget to twist bar to lock when done.
Shoulders under pads, back flat on pad.
Lower under control to 90° knee bend.
Press up — don't lock out hard.
zh-Hans: 肩膀顶护垫, 背贴靠板.

en: Don't let lower back round at bottom.
Bar on floor behind heels, deadlift grip.
Stand upright, bar against back of thighs.
Squat down keeping bar close to legs.
Stand up, squeeze quads at top.
zh-Hans: 杠铃在脚跟后, 抓握硬拉位.
站直, 杠铃贴大腿后.
起身, 顶部收紧股四头.
老式动作 — 重量适中.

en: Stand tall, hold something for balance.
Lean back, rise on toes, knees forward.
zh-Hans: 站直, 扶物保持平衡.
后仰, 踮脚尖, 膝盖前推.

en: Hard on knees — skip if you have knee issues.
zh-Hans: 对膝盖压力大 — 膝盖有伤勿做.
小腿固定在器械护垫中.
下降至股四头完全拉伸.

en: Back flat against wall, feet forward.
Press back through heels to stand.
zh-Hans: 大腿与地面平行 — 保持.

en: Belt around hips, weight hangs below.
Stand on platform, hands on handles.
zh-Hans: 腰带固定髋部, 重量下垂.
站平台, 双手扶把手.

en: Feet shoulder-width, arms forward for balance.
Sit back and down, chest up.
zh-Hans: 双脚与肩同宽, 双臂前伸平衡.

en: Land softly, absorb in next squat.
zh-Hans: 四分之一蹲, 双臂后摆.
爆发跳起, 髋部完全伸展.
轻柔落地, 缓冲入下一蹲.

en: Land softly — heavy landings stress knees.
Skip if you have lower-body joint issues.
zh-Hans: 轻柔落地 — 重落地伤膝.

en: Bar in crook of elbows, hands clasped.
Drive up keeping bar locked in arms.
zh-Hans: 杠铃放肘窝, 双手交握.
站直, 核心强力收紧.
下蹲, 躯干保持直立.
起身, 杠铃锁在臂弯.

en: Use sleeve or pad — bar bruises arms.
Keep moderate weight, very demanding on core.
zh-Hans: 用护臂或软垫 — 杠铃压臂淤青.
重量适中, 对核心要求极高.

en: SSB on back, handles in front.
Hold handles or rack handles in front.
Squat down — bar pushes torso forward.
Drive up, fight bar pulling you down.
zh-Hans: 安全杠放背上, 手柄在前.
下蹲 — 杠铃推躯干前倾.
起身, 对抗杠铃下拉.

en: Rear foot on bench, front foot 2-3 feet ahead.
Lower until front thigh parallel to floor.
Drive through front heel back up.
zh-Hans: 后脚放卧推凳, 前脚距凳 60-90 cm.
下降至前腿大腿与地面平行.

en: Front knee should track over toes, not collapse inward.
zh-Hans: 前膝盖跟脚尖方向一致, 不要内扣.

en: Bar on back, rear foot on bench.
zh-Hans: 杠铃放背上, 后脚放凳.
前膝盖跟脚尖方向一致.

name.zh-Hans: 保加利亚分腿蹲 (史密斯机)

en: Bar on back, rear foot on bench behind.
zh-Hans: 杠铃放背上, 后脚放凳.

en: Rear foot on bench, front foot 60-90 cm forward.
zh-Hans: 后脚放凳, 前脚向前 60-90 cm.
前膝盖跟脚尖方向一致.
双手持哑铃, 分腿站立.
杠铃放背上, 分腿站立.
前膝盖跟脚尖方向一致.

en: Dumbbells at sides, face the box.
Step up driving through working heel.
Step down with control, alternate legs.
zh-Hans: 双手持哑铃, 面对箱.
踩上箱, 工作腿脚跟发力.

en: Don't push off bottom foot — use top leg only.
zh-Hans: 不要用下方脚蹬地 — 只用上方腿发力.

en: Bar on back, face the box.
Step up, drive through working heel.
Stand tall on top of box.
zh-Hans: 杠铃放背上, 面对箱.
踩上箱, 工作腿脚跟发力.

en: Face a box or sturdy step.
Step up, drive through working heel.
zh-Hans: 踩上, 工作腿脚跟发力.

en: Step forward into a lunge, knee near floor.
Drive up and step forward with other leg.
zh-Hans: 向前迈步弓步, 后膝近地.
起身, 另一腿向前迈.

en: Front knee should not pass far over toe.
Drive up, step forward with other leg.
zh-Hans: 向前迈步, 下降弓步.
起身, 另一腿向前迈.

en: Balance is harder — keep core tight.
zh-Hans: 平衡更难 — 核心保持收紧.

en: Stand tall, step forward into lunge.
Back knee near floor, front thigh parallel.
Drive up, step forward with other leg.
zh-Hans: 站直, 向前迈步弓步.
后膝近地, 前腿水平.
起身, 另一腿向前迈.

en: Step one leg back into lunge.
Step one leg back into lunge.
Stand tall, step one leg back.
Lower into lunge, back knee near floor.
zh-Hans: 下降弓步, 后膝近地.

en: Step one leg forward into lunge.
Push back to start, alternate legs.
Step one leg forward into lunge.
Sit hips back, bend one knee.
Other leg stays straight, foot flat.
Push back to start, alternate sides.
zh-Hans: 双手持哑铃, 大开站位.
髋部后坐, 一腿屈膝.
另一腿伸直, 脚平踩.

en: Working knee tracks over toe — don't twist.
zh-Hans: 工作膝盖跟脚尖方向一致 — 不要扭.

en: Sit back into one hip, bend that knee.
zh-Hans: 大开站位, 双手胸前.
髋部后坐一侧, 屈膝.

en: Keep front knee tracking forward — don't twist.
Step one leg behind and across.

zh-Hans: 杠铃放背上, 大开站位.

en: Land in lunge with other leg forward.
zh-Hans: 爆发跳起, 空中换腿.

en: High knee impact — skip if knee issues.
zh-Hans: 对膝盖冲击大 — 膝盖有伤勿做.

en: Stand on one leg, other leg extended forward.
Squat all the way down on one leg.
Drive up keeping free leg off ground.
zh-Hans: 单腿站立, 另一腿前伸.

en: Requires extreme mobility and strength — progress slowly.
Use support like TRX or doorway to build up.
zh-Hans: 需要极强灵活性和力量 — 渐进训练.
可借助 TRX 或门框过渡.

en: Use upper body just for balance.
zh-Hans: 扶 TRX 或牢固支撑.
单腿深蹲, 轻度辅助.

en: Stand on one leg, other foot grabbed behind.
Squat down until back knee touches floor.
zh-Hans: 单腿站立, 另一脚在身后抓握.
难度极高 — 渐进训练.

en: Stand on one leg in front of box.
Squat down to tap glutes on box.
Stand on one leg, other knee bent behind.
Squat down, back knee toward floor.
zh-Hans: 单腿站立, 另一膝弯曲在身后.

en: Very wide stance, toes slightly out.
Shift weight to one side, deep squat.
Other leg fully straight, toe up.
zh-Hans: 极宽站位, 脚尖微外展.
另一腿伸直, 脚尖朝上.
切换至另一侧, 交替.

en: Requires good hip mobility — go slow at first.
zh-Hans: 需要良好髋部灵活性 — 开始时缓慢.

en: Hold dumbbell at chest, very wide stance.
Shift to one side, deep squat.
zh-Hans: 胸前持哑铃, 极宽站位.
另一腿伸直, 脚尖朝上.
切换至另一侧, 交替.

en: Wide stance, drop heel of straight leg.
Shift fully to one side in deep squat.
Stay low, shift to opposite side.
zh-Hans: 宽站位, 直腿脚跟落地.
保持低位, 切换至对侧.
杠铃放背上, 宽站位.
脚尖外展 45°, 垂直下坐.
宽站位, 壶铃在腿间.
膝盖跟脚尖, 蹲到底.

en: Don't let lower back round off pad.
Press up — don't lock out hard.
Don't go too deep — lower back rounds.
Don't lock knees with heavy weight.
zh-Hans: 不要下放过深 — 下背圆.
重量大时膝盖不要硬锁.

en: Press out smoothly to near full extension.
zh-Hans: 坐姿, 双脚与肩同宽踩平台.
控制返回 — 不要反弹.

en: Lie on back, feet straight up on platform.
Press up to near full extension.
zh-Hans: 仰卧, 双脚向上踩平台.

en: Don't lift hips off pad — protects lower back.
zh-Hans: 髋部不要离开靠垫 — 保护下背.

en: Focus on glute and hamstring stretch.
Feet close together, low on platform.
zh-Hans: 双脚并拢, 低位踩平台.

en: Feet wide, toes 45° out on platform.
zh-Hans: 双脚宽距, 脚尖外展 45°.
推起, 重点大腿内侧.

en: Sit in machine, pad on shin.
zh-Hans: 坐器械, 护垫在小腿.

en: Don't jerk weight up — controlled tempo.
zh-Hans: 不要猛甩 — 控制节奏.

en: Sit in machine, work one leg at a time.
zh-Hans: 伸到完全锁定, 收紧.
慢速离心, 控制下放.

en: Lie face down, pad above ankles.
zh-Hans: 俯卧, 护垫在脚踝上方.

en: Sit in machine, pad on calves.
zh-Hans: 坐器械, 护垫在小腿.
控制返回 — 完全拉伸.

en: Stand in machine, pad above ankle.
zh-Hans: 站器械, 护垫在脚踝上方.

en: Lie face down, one leg under pad.
zh-Hans: 俯卧, 一腿在护垫下.

en: Kneel, ankles anchored by partner or bar.
Slowly lower torso forward, body rigid.
Catch with hands, push back up.
zh-Hans: 跪姿, 脚踝由伙伴或杠固定.
缓慢前倾躯干, 身体保持直线.
手撑接住, 推回起身.

en: Don't rush — soreness from this is intense.
zh-Hans: 极具挑战 — 先练离心.
不要急于求成 — 酸痛会非常剧烈.

en: Pull back up with band help.
zh-Hans: 跪姿, 脚踝固定, 弹力带从头顶辅助.
下放躯干, 弹力带辅助.

en: Position face down in GHD machine.
Thighs on pad, ankles in clamp.
Lower torso, then curl back up.
zh-Hans: 大腿在垫上, 脚踝在卡扣中.
下放躯干, 然后弯举起身.

en: Hard exercise — build up reps slowly.
zh-Hans: 动作较难 — 渐进增加次数.

en: Dumbbells in front, soft knee bend.
Hinge at hips, dumbbells down legs.
zh-Hans: 哑铃在身前, 膝盖微弯.
髋部铰链, 哑铃沿腿下放.

en: Don't round lower back — keep neutral spine.
zh-Hans: 不要圆下背 — 脊柱中立.

name.zh-Hans: 单腿罗马尼亚硬拉 (哑铃)

en: Dumbbells in hands, stand on one leg.
Hinge at hip, other leg extends back.
Drive hip up to stand, repeat.
zh-Hans: 双手持哑铃, 单腿站立.
髋部铰链, 另一腿后伸.
底部身体呈 T 字.
髋部上顶起身, 重复.

en: Balance is hard — start with light weight.
zh-Hans: 平衡难 — 从轻重量开始.

en: Hinge hips back, hike between legs.
Drive hips forward — kettlebell to shoulder.
Let it swing back down, repeat.
zh-Hans: 宽站位, 壶铃在双脚间.
髋部后铰链, 壶铃后摆.
髋部前顶 — 壶铃摆至肩.

en: Drive with hips not arms — common mistake.
zh-Hans: 用髋部发力, 不用手臂 — 常见错误.

en: Upper back on bench, bar across hips.
Drive hips up, squeeze glutes hard.
zh-Hans: 上背靠卧推凳, 杠铃横在髋上.
双脚平踩, 膝盖弯曲 90°.
髋部上顶, 强烈收紧臀部.

en: Use a pad on bar — hip bones bruise.
Don't overextend lower back at top.
zh-Hans: 杠铃用护垫 — 不然髋骨淤青.
顶部不要过度反弓下背.

en: Upper back on bench, one foot planted.
zh-Hans: 上背靠凳, 一脚踩地.
髋部上顶 — 单腿收紧.

en: Position back on pad, hips under bar.
Drive hips up to full extension.
zh-Hans: 背靠垫, 髋部在杠下.
收紧臀部, 控制下放.

en: Upper back on bench under Smith bar.
zh-Hans: 上背靠卧推凳, 在杠下.
杠铃横在髋上, 加护垫.
顶部收紧臀部, 下放.

en: Upper back on bench, band around hips.
Anchor band low on either side.
Drive hips up against band tension.
zh-Hans: 上背靠凳, 弹力带绕髋部.

en: Upper back on bench, dumbbell on hips.
zh-Hans: 上背靠凳, 哑铃放髋上.
髋部上顶, 收紧臀部.

en: Lie on back, knees bent, feet flat.
zh-Hans: 仰卧, 屈膝, 双脚平踩.

en: Lie on back, bar across hips with pad.
Knees bent, feet flat on floor.
zh-Hans: 仰卧, 杠铃横在髋上加护垫.

en: Use pad — bar bruises hip bones.
zh-Hans: 用护垫 — 杠铃压髋骨.

en: Lie on back, one foot planted, other up.
Drive hips up on one leg.
zh-Hans: 仰卧, 一脚踩地, 另腿上举.

en: Lie on back, feet elevated on bench.
zh-Hans: 仰卧, 双脚抬高放凳.
髋部上顶, 收紧臀部.

en: Lie on back, soles together, knees out.
zh-Hans: 仰卧, 脚掌相对, 膝盖外展.
髋部上顶, 收紧臀部.

en: Ankle strap on cable, face machine.
Hinge slightly forward, hands on stack.
zh-Hans: 脚踝绑绳索, 面对器械.
略前倾, 双手扶器械.
腿向后踢, 收紧臀部.

en: Foot on pad, chest against pad.
Press leg back to full extension.
zh-Hans: 脚踏护垫, 胸贴靠垫.

en: On all fours, hands under shoulders.
Kick one leg back, knee bent.
zh-Hans: 四肢支撑, 手在肩下.
脚掌向上, 收紧臀部.

en: On all fours, kick leg back.
zh-Hans: 弹力带绕脚, 低位固定.

en: Lift one knee out to the side.
zh-Hans: 髋部外展, 核心收紧.

en: On all fours, lift knee out.
zh-Hans: 迷你弹力带在膝盖上方.
四肢支撑, 膝向侧外抬.

en: Open top knee, hips don't rotate.
zh-Hans: 髋部叠放, 双脚并拢.
上膝打开, 髋部不转.
迷你弹力带在膝上, 侧卧.

en: Lie face down on pad, hips at edge.
zh-Hans: 俯卧靠垫, 髋部在边缘.
收紧臀部, 缓慢下放.

en: Don't hyperextend lower back at top.
zh-Hans: 顶部不要过度反弓下背.
髋部在垫上, 脚踝固定.
短暂保持, 控制下放.

en: Ankle strap on cable, side stance.
zh-Hans: 脚踝绑绳索, 侧向站立.

en: Sit in machine, pads on outer thighs.
zh-Hans: 坐器械, 护垫在大腿外侧.

en: Sit in machine, pads on inner thighs.
zh-Hans: 坐器械, 护垫在大腿内侧.

en: Ankle strap on cable, side stance.
zh-Hans: 脚踝绑绳索, 侧向站立.

en: Ankle strap on cable, side stance.
Cable from inside, pull leg out.
zh-Hans: 脚踝绑绳索, 侧向站立.
绳索在内侧, 腿向外抬.
迷你弹力带在膝上, 半蹲位.

en: Rise up on toes, fully extend ankles.
zh-Hans: 站直, 双脚与肩同宽.
踮起脚尖, 踝关节完全伸展.
缓慢下放, 充分拉伸.

en: Rise on toes to full extension.
zh-Hans: 缓慢下放, 充分拉伸.

en: Bar on upper back, stand tall.
Rise on toes to full height.
zh-Hans: 强烈收紧, 短暂保持.
缓慢下放, 充分拉伸.

en: Shoulders under pads, toes on platform.
Press up on toes to full extension.
zh-Hans: 肩膀在护垫下, 脚尖踩平台.
推起踮脚尖至完全伸展.
收紧, 缓慢下放拉伸.

name.zh-Hans: 提踵 (站姿, 史密斯机)

en: Bar on back, toes on plate or block.
Rise on toes to full height.
zh-Hans: 杠铃放背上, 脚尖踩杠片或台.

en: Sit in machine, pads on thighs.
Press up on toes to top.
zh-Hans: 坐器械, 护垫在大腿.
脚尖踩板, 脚跟下沉.

en: Sit on bench, dumbbells on thighs.
zh-Hans: 坐凳, 哑铃放大腿上.
脚尖踩块, 脚跟悬空.
缓慢下放, 充分拉伸.

en: Bend at hips, back parallel to floor.
Pad on hips, toes on platform.
zh-Hans: 髋部前屈, 背与地面平行.
护垫在髋部, 脚尖踩平台.

en: Stand on one foot, hold support.
Stand on one foot on block.
On leg press, toes at edge of platform.
Heels off platform, knees slight bend.
zh-Hans: 腿推机上, 脚尖在平台边缘.
脚跟悬空, 膝盖微弯.
脚尖发力推, 完全伸展.
缓慢下放, 充分拉伸.

en: Don't lock knees on leg press.

name.zh-Hans: 提踵 (坐姿, 史密斯机)

en: Bench under bar, sit with bar on thighs.
zh-Hans: 凳放杠下, 坐姿杠在大腿上.
脚尖踩块, 脚跟悬空.
重点比目鱼 — 坐姿角度.

en: Stand against wall, heels touching wall.

zh-Hans: 坐姿, 哑铃竖立放脚趾上.

en: Sit in machine, foot under pad.
zh-Hans: 坐器械, 脚在护垫下.
收紧胫骨, 缓慢下放.

en: Anchor band low, loop around toes.
zh-Hans: 弹力带低位固定, 套脚尖.

en: Bounce up off toes, minimal knee bend.
Land lightly on balls of feet.
zh-Hans: 脚尖弹起, 膝盖几乎不弯.

en: Bend at hips, hands on bench.
zh-Hans: 髋部前屈, 双手扶凳.
脚尖踩块, 脚跟悬空.

en: Sit in machine, work one leg at time.
zh-Hans: 脚尖踩板, 脚跟下沉.

en: Standing calf machine, one foot on plate.
zh-Hans: 站姿提踵器械, 单脚踩板.

en: Lean forward, hands on sled handles.
Drive with legs, short choppy steps.
Push through full extension each step.
zh-Hans: 前倾, 双手握雪橇手柄.
腿发力, 小步快速推进.
身体前倾 — 类似冲刺.

en: Heavy on cardio and legs — pace yourself.
zh-Hans: 心肺和腿压力大 — 注意配速.

en: Grip low or high handles, lean in.
zh-Hans: 握低位或高位把手, 身体前倾.

en: Face sled, attach harness or grip rope.
zh-Hans: 面对雪橇, 系腰带或抓绳.
对膝盖友好 — 适合康复.

en: Hold bar at hip level, slight knee bend.
Push hips back, bar slides down legs.
zh-Hans: 杠铃握于髋部高度, 膝盖微弯.
髋部后推, 杠铃沿腿下滑.

en: Don't round lower back at bottom.
Use straps if grip fails before hams.
zh-Hans: 握力不够先于腘绳衰竭可用握带.

name.zh-Hans: 单腿罗马尼亚硬拉 (杠铃)

en: Bar in hands, stand on one leg.
Hinge at hip, back leg extends.
Drive hip up to stand, repeat.
zh-Hans: 手握杠铃, 单腿站立.
髋部铰链, 后腿伸展.
底部身体呈 T 字.
髋部上顶起身, 重复.
平衡困难 — 从轻重量开始.

name.zh-Hans: 单腿罗马尼亚硬拉 (壶铃)

en: Kettlebell in opposite hand, stand on one leg.
Hinge at hip, back leg extends.
zh-Hans: 异侧手持壶铃, 单腿站立.
髋部铰链, 后腿伸展.
下放近地, 腘绳拉伸.

en: Sit on bench, bar on upper back.
zh-Hans: 起身回直立, 背挺直.

en: Light weight — lower back is exposed.

zh-Hans: 抓举握距, 杠铃过头.
杠铃锁定, 核心收紧.

en: Stand on raised platform, dumbbells at sides.
Step back into reverse lunge below platform.
zh-Hans: 站抬高平台, 双手持哑铃.

en: Upper back on bench, bar across hips.
One foot flat, other on heel for balance.
zh-Hans: 上背靠凳, 杠铃横在髋上.
一脚平踩, 另脚仅脚跟点地平衡.

en: Upper back on bench, foot planted.
Drive hips up on one leg.
zh-Hans: 上背靠凳, 一脚踩地.
收紧臀部, 控制下放.

en: Mini-band above knees, lie on back.
Drive hips up, push knees outward.
zh-Hans: 迷你弹力带在膝上, 仰卧.
髋部上顶, 膝盖外推.
臀桥位置, 髋部上抬.
髋部保持上抬 — 不要下沉.

en: Slight knee bend, hinge at hips.
zh-Hans: 膝盖微弯, 髋部铰链.

en: Stand on one leg, squat down.
Drive up, complete reps each side.
Drive up, step forward with other leg.
zh-Hans: 起身, 另一腿向前迈.

en: Return, lunge to side (3), then back (6).
zh-Hans: 返回, 侧向 (3 点), 后撤 (6 点).

en: Squat down keeping bar over mid-foot.
zh-Hans: 抓举握距, 杠铃锁过头.
下蹲, 杠铃在脚中位.

en: Demands extreme mobility — work up slowly.
Easy to lose balance — drop weight if needed.
zh-Hans: 需要极强灵活性 — 渐进训练.
易失衡 — 必要时弃铃.

en: Set pins at sticking point depth.
Bar rests on pins from dead start.
Reset bar on pins between reps.
zh-Hans: 杠铃从保护杠上静止启动.
每次重置杠铃回保护杠.
起始力量变体, 难度高.

en: Bar on safeties at parallel depth.
Bottom up — no eccentric, dead start.
Return bar to safeties each rep.
zh-Hans: 杠铃放保护杠, 平行深度.
底部启动 — 无离心, 静止启动.

en: Bar on back in Smith machine.
Bar on back in Smith machine.
Step one leg back into lunge.
Bar on back in Smith machine.

zh-Hans: 下蹲, 躯干保持直立.

en: Sit hips back, working leg bends.
zh-Hans: 髋部后坐, 工作腿屈.

en: Hinge at hips, slight knee bend.
zh-Hans: 髋部铰链, 膝盖微弯.

en: Stand inside trap bar, grip handles.
zh-Hans: 站六角杠内, 抓握把.
髋下沉, 挺胸, 收紧.

en: Easier on lower back than barbell deadlift.
zh-Hans: 比杠铃硬拉对下背更友好.
仍需脊柱中立 — 不要圆背.

en: Drive knees out, push floor away.
zh-Hans: 宽站位, 握距在膝内.

en: Wide stance, dumbbell vertical between legs.
zh-Hans: 宽站位, 哑铃竖立在腿间.
髋部后坐, 下放哑铃.

en: Bar at hip level, legs nearly straight.
Hinge at hips, bar slides down.
zh-Hans: 杠铃在髋部高度, 腿近直.
髋部铰链, 杠铃下滑.

en: Don't lock knees — slight bend allowed.
zh-Hans: 不要锁膝 — 允许微弯.
下背暴露 — 保持中立.

en: Dumbbells in front, legs nearly straight.
zh-Hans: 哑铃在身前, 腿近直.
髋部铰链, 哑铃下放.

en: Upper back on bench, bar across hips.
Drive hips up on single leg.
zh-Hans: 上背靠凳, 杠铃横在髋上.
一脚平踩, 另腿伸展.
难度大 — 先从徒手开始.

en: Lie on back, dumbbell on hips.
zh-Hans: 收紧臀部, 控制下放.

en: Step one leg behind, across body.
zh-Hans: 一腿向斜后方迈步交叉.

en: Stay in lunge position, hands on hips.
zh-Hans: 保持弓步位置, 双手插腰.
保持低位, 不要起身.
双手持哑铃, 分腿站立.

en: Jump forward as far as possible.
zh-Hans: 站直, 双脚与肩同宽.
四分之一蹲, 双臂后摆.
轻柔落地, 跳间重置.

en: Stand on box, step off (don't jump down).
zh-Hans: 站箱上, 走下 (不要跳下).
轻柔落地, 立刻爆发上跳.
高级 — 先建立基础力量.
轻柔落地, 立即重复.

en: Hop sideways, land on one leg.
Other leg sweeps behind in skater pose.
Push off landing leg to opposite side.
Explosively press through toes to jump.
Start in lunge, one leg forward.
zh-Hans: 起始弓步, 一腿在前.

en: Knee impact — skip if knee issues.
zh-Hans: 膝盖冲击 — 膝盖有伤勿做.
双手持哑铃, 四分之一蹲.
爆发上跳, 哑铃压住.
轻柔落地, 立即重复.
用中等哑铃 — 控制重要.
四分之一蹲, 爆发跳起.

en: Face box, one foot on box.
Drive up, switch legs in air.
Land with other foot on box.
Hold kettlebell in front, soft knee bend.
zh-Hans: 壶铃在身前, 膝盖微弯.
髋部铰链, 壶铃下放.

name.zh-Hans: 罗马尼亚硬拉 (史密斯机)

en: Bar at hip height in Smith.
Hinge at hips, bar slides down.
zh-Hans: 杠铃在史密斯机髋部高度.
髋部铰链, 杠铃下滑.

en: Hip thrust position, hips up at top.
Lower 6 inches, then drive back up.
Short pulse range — stay near top.
zh-Hans: 臀推位置, 顶部髋部上抬.
小幅脉冲 — 接近顶部.

en: Step into lunge stance, hands on hips.
Lower in place, back knee toward floor.
Stand back up, stay in stance.
zh-Hans: 迈入弓步位, 双手插腰.
原地下放, 后膝近地.

name.zh-Hans: 行走弓步 (哑铃, 过头)
罗马尼亚硬拉 (哑铃, B 位)

en: Dumbbells in hands, B-stance — one foot kicked back, on toes.
Hinge at hips, work primary leg.
zh-Hans: 双手持哑铃, B 位 — 一脚后撤踮脚.
髋部铰链, 主腿发力.

en: Stand wide, kettlebell in one hand.
Hinge hips back, swing between legs.
Drive hips forward, kettlebell to shoulder.
Switch hands mid-swing or after set.
zh-Hans: 宽站位, 单手持壶铃.
髋部后铰链, 壶铃后摆.
髋部前顶, 壶铃摆至肩.
髋部发力, 不是手臂拉.

en: Let it swing back down, repeat.
zh-Hans: 宽站位, 壶铃在双脚间.
髋部后铰链, 壶铃后摆.
髋部前顶 — 壶铃摆至过头.

en: Shoulder mobility needed — skip if shoulder issues.
zh-Hans: 需要肩部灵活性 — 肩部有伤勿做.

name.zh-Hans: 行走弓步 (壶铃, 过头)
行走弓步 (杠铃, 过头)

zh-Hans: 抓举握距, 杠铃锁过头.
对核心和肩部灵活性要求高.

en: Step one leg back into lunge.
Bar on back in Smith machine.
Step out wide to one side.
Sit hips back into that leg.
Stand on band, ends in hands at hips.
Hinge at hips, hands lower toward floor.
zh-Hans: 踩弹力带, 端头握于髋部.
髋部铰链, 双手下放近地.
弹力带张力下腘绳拉伸.

en: Band looped under feet, across upper back.
Hinge at hips, torso lowers forward.
zh-Hans: 弹力带踩脚下, 绕上背.
髋部铰链, 躯干前倾下放.

en: Dumbbells at sides, start in lunge.
Explode up, switch legs in air.
zh-Hans: 双手持哑铃, 起始弓步.
爆发上跳, 空中换腿.
只用轻重量 — 冲击大.
轻柔落地, 立即跳回.

en: Push back through heels to stand.

name.zh-Hans: 臀部后踢 (绳索, 屈膝)

en: Push leg back with bent knee.
Band around ankles, hand on wall.
Stand tall, kick one leg back.
zh-Hans: 弹力带绕脚踝, 手扶墙.

en: Sit in machine, work one leg at time.
Press outer thigh out against pad.
zh-Hans: 强烈收紧, 缓慢返回.

en: Sit in machine, lean torso forward.
zh-Hans: 向外推 — 偏重臀中肌.

en: Sit in machine, lean torso forward.

zh-Hans: 侧平板位置, 前臂着地.
短暂保持, 控制下放.
后弓步, 返回. 重复.

en: Bar on back in Smith machine.
Slight knee bend, hinge at hips.
zh-Hans: 膝盖微弯, 髋部铰链.

en: Don't round back — fixed path doesn't save spine.
zh-Hans: 不要圆背 — 固定轨迹也保护不了脊柱.

en: Set up on hack squat, toes at edge.
zh-Hans: 哈克深蹲机, 脚尖在边缘.
脚跟悬空, 膝盖微弯.
脚尖发力推, 完全伸展.
缓慢下放, 充分拉伸.

en: Keep heels down, push knees up.
zh-Hans: 脚跟保持落地, 膝盖上推.

en: Stand in front of chair, feet wide.
Squat down to lightly tap chair.
Hold TRX handles, lean back slightly.
zh-Hans: 握 TRX 把手, 略后倾.

en: Hold TRX handles, stand on one leg.
Hinge at hip, back leg extends.
Drive hip up to stand, switch.
zh-Hans: 握 TRX 把手, 单腿站立.
髋部铰链, 后腿伸展.
髋部上顶起身, 换边.

en: Lie on back, heels on Swiss ball.
Curl ball toward glutes with heels.
zh-Hans: 仰卧, 脚跟放瑜伽球上.

en: Lie on back, sliders under heels.
zh-Hans: 仰卧, 滑盘在脚跟下.

en: Band anchored low, loop around ankles.
Curl heels to glutes against band.
zh-Hans: 弹力带低位固定, 套脚踝.
脚跟弯举向臀, 对抗弹力带.

en: Stand front foot on raised platform.
Upper back on bench, kettlebell on hips.
zh-Hans: 上背靠凳, 壶铃放髋上.
髋部上顶, 收紧臀部.

en: Lie on back, knees bent, feet flat.
zh-Hans: 仰卧, 屈膝, 双脚平踩.

en: Slowly lower other heel to floor.
Don't put weight on lower foot.
zh-Hans: 缓慢下放另一脚跟至地.

en: Face box, one foot on box.

zh-Hans: 保持低位, 不要起身.
高次数, 股四头灼烧.

en: Lie on back, foot on elevated bench.
Drive hips up on one leg.
Cable low, rope or bar attached.
Hold at hip height, step back.
zh-Hans: 绳索低位, 接绳或杆.
握于髋部高度, 后撤.
髋部铰链, 腘绳拉伸.

en: Rope between legs, hinge at hips.
zh-Hans: 绳在腿间, 髋部铰链.
髋部前顶, 收紧臀部.

name.zh-Hans: 臀部后踢 (站姿, 弹力带)

zh-Hans: 弹力带低位固定, 绕脚踝.

name.zh-Hans: 后脚抬高分腿蹲 (史密斯机)

en: Smith bar on back, rear foot on bench.
zh-Hans: 史密斯机杠铃放背上, 后脚放凳.

en: Step one leg back, knee toward floor.
zh-Hans: 一腿后撤, 膝盖近地.

en: Use momentum to roll back up.
Drive bar overhead, split legs simultaneously.
Catch bar overhead, in split stance.
zh-Hans: 推杠过头, 同时分腿.

en: Olympic lift — coach required for safety.
zh-Hans: 奥举动作 — 需要教练保护.
抓举握距, 杠铃在地面.
奥举辅助 — 需要教练指导.

en: Shrug bar high, elbows pulled back.
zh-Hans: 翻举握距, 杠铃在地面.
爆发拉起, 三重伸展.
奥举类 — 建议教练指导.

en: Bar at front rack, squat to full depth.
zh-Hans: 杠铃在前架位, 深蹲至底.
下放至前架位, 重复.
高难度复合 — 从轻重量开始.

en: Stand on step, one foot only.
Heel drops below step, full stretch.
zh-Hans: 脚跟低于台阶, 充分拉伸.
弹力带后方固定, 绕脚踝.
收紧股四头, 缓慢下放.

en: Dumbbell vertical in crook of elbows.
Safety bar on back, hold handles.
Bar pushes torso forward — fight it.
zh-Hans: 安全杠放背上, 握手柄.
杠铃推躯干前倾 — 对抗.

en: Band under feet, ends held at shoulders.
zh-Hans: 弹力带踩脚下, 端头扛肩.

name.zh-Hans: 罗马尼亚硬拉 (B 位, 哑铃)

en: Stand B-stance — one foot back, on toes.
Hinge at hips, work primary leg.
zh-Hans: B 位站立 — 一脚后撤踮脚.
髋部铰链, 主腿发力.

en: Bend at hips, hands on bench.
zh-Hans: 髋部前屈, 双手扶凳.
脚尖踩块, 脚跟悬空.

en: Dumbbells at sides, face high box.
Drive up, don't push off bottom foot.
zh-Hans: 双手持哑铃, 面对高箱.
蹬起, 不要用下方脚.

en: Step one leg forward into lunge.
Return, then step other leg forward.
Set up on leg press, knees bent.
zh-Hans: 小范围 — 股四头灼烧.

en: Hip thrust setup, bar across hips.
Drive up, pause 3 seconds at top.
zh-Hans: 臀推位置, 杠铃横在髋上.
上顶, 顶部暂停 3 秒.

en: Lower bar, pause 3 sec in stretch.
zh-Hans: 标准罗马尼亚硬拉位置.
下放, 拉伸位暂停 3 秒.
